name: replayio
description: Direct Replay.io dev tools for Replay Chromium recording, ffmpeg-backed MP4 browser evidence, upload hooks, and Replay MCP debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Direct Replay.io dev tools for recordings, ffmpeg-backed MP4 evidence, and Replay MCP debugging
interface.longDescription: Open browser sessions through packaged lifecycle scripts that enable Replay recording flags and start WebM screencast capture automatically, then stop capture, transcode to MP4 with ffmpeg, close the browser, verify the MP4 artifact, and upload pending Replay recordings when the browser closes. A Codex stop hook also runs close/upload cleanup as a safety net. Use Replay MCP tools to analyze uploaded recordings with rich debugging widgets for logpoints, console output, React trees, Redux state, network requests, screenshots, source code, profiles, and exception stacks.
defaultPrompt: Record an agent browser session against this local app, embed the MP4 video, and analyze the resulting recording
Inspect this uploaded Replay recording through Replay MCP and summarize the root cause evidence
